reviews.review_description: I love this room scale game is fun exciting I need more please make more of these type of games they're fun and immersive these type of games make you feel like you actually in the environment when you can physically walk around and interact we need more of this keep up the good work dav can you please make more games like this we don't have enough of these on the quest and the graphics and the realism feels real The room scale is phenomenal if this team still alive and still kicking please make more games like this

It is a fairly good game. The first room is very engaging but the following rooms are pretty glitchy with certain aspects (trying to grab/hold certain items, not being able to interact with others, accidentally walking into a item that then flies across the room or disappears, smooth turning going haywire).  It makes a couple of rooms pretty frustrating but still worth it in my opinion. I am still glad that I bought the game and I am looking forward to the updates.
Game was very great But way to short I am looking forward for updates or else I am getting my money back. But the game had great puzzles,detail and awesome quality.

I've played a lot of puzzle games, but this one truly stands out as one of the best. The concept is simple yet gripping: In the near future, a meteorite threatens humanity, and everyone is placed in AI-controlled bunkers for survival. But something goes wrong...

The gameplay is smooth, the graphics are impressive, and everything feels lifelike and well-animated. I heard that the developers are moving the game to Unreal Engine 5, so we might see some exciting improvements soon—but good things take time.

Not everything is perfect, though. There are a few bugs, like issues with grabbing objects. Sometimes you pick them up with your fingertips instead of your palm. I also had trouble feeding the rat. It would be great if breadcrumbs reappeared when lost or if there were a way to cut more from the bread. The game also ended very abruptly, leaving you with the feeling that there should be more. I believe, with time, more rooms will be added to complete the story. 

This game has so much potential for an immersive VR experience like no other. If you're skeptical, just try the free trial. The developers are constantly adding new content, and I'm excited to see what the game will look like after the next updates. All in all, this is a must-play for puzzle fans!!
I enjoyed the game but it was over too quickly.

This is not the first time I tried an escape room in VR, but I have to say, this one belongs to the better ones, if not the best one! I managed to escape from the first 7 rooms, but it is getting harder. You not only have to figure out puzzles,but sometimes you have to be quick, nimble and make the timing right. Definitely deserves 5 stars!!
Thrilling room escape game! Puzzles were challenging, atmosphere immersive. A must-try for Meta Quest owners!

I really like the atmosphere in this game and the graphics . I love quest rooms, in this game a lot of riddles on logic, I really liked the room with a tunnel, there are a few extreme moments. I played this game with the room scale  moving and it is a completely different experience . I recommend it to everyone

reviews.review_title: very decent game already in early access
reviews.review_description: The puzzles are great... fair and challenging... I felt very immersed in that world, there are many good ideas... great varied of puzzles also... sure there is room for polishing the haptics or the menu, but hey its early access... and therefore its very fun... all in all its promising...

developer_response.body: Thank you! Each such review, gives strength to work on the game even more and make this game only better!

reviews.review_description: Wonderful experience, thank you very much, great game
Good game , I recommend.

I have not made it very far into the game yet but it has been a fun game to play. Puzzle games in VR are so much better because you are pulled into the game even more then anything else. I would recommend this game to any one who loves a challenge of figuring out how to get out a locked room situation.

The only thing I could say about the game I had a little issue with was sometimes the words would get blurry when looking at the straight on.

reviews.review_title: No clues no logic no pattern
reviews.review_description: Been kicked out of room 20 times  for restart game seems broken puzzles  are clueless with no logic or pattern to them pretty lame 🤔 didn't enjoy this broken game at all. There's no help vids either since nobody plays the game so there is no answers as I Google and looked on utube . Dissapointing

developer_response.body:
I'm sorry if the game made you uncomfortable! I'm constantly working to improve the game, and if I find out that there is a bug, within a few days trying to fix it.  

It would help me a lot in my development if you could point me to where you ran into the problem. I will fix it as soon as possible! Email me at polybuilders.team@gmail.com or on the discord which is listed on the site www.escapefrombunker.com

I've already added a separate "TIPS" page to www.escapefrombunker.com
If one does not have much time, what would take a long time to think about the solution of any riddle, you can just look at the answer on this page and then enjoy the story of the game.

Anyway, thanks for your feedback! I'm always happy to get good criticism and constantly working on what would make the game better!

reviews.review_description: This game is different! I found myself crouching down peeking inside a cabinet which felt way too real! The collision physics are spot on and your hand looks difficult grabbing a cup from the top than grabbing from the handle. You can truly use your entire play space  because each level is the perfect size to slow move around in safely and have an amazingly immersive experience. Poking a back scratcher through a tiny window fan to turn around a computer monitor is very intuitive! A very well polished game experience with the potential to be a great game with added levels and updates minor play mechanics like a hurdle or crouch first person animation over and under objects. Most of all BRING US MORE PLEASE!!!

developer_response.body: I am very pleased to read that you liked the game! It inspires me to keep working on the game! And create new levels in the future!

reviews.review_description: Great physics, visuals, and puzzle solving. Was left wanting more. Great job.

This was a great game. The graphics are so real. Crouching, vertigo. Fantastic.
The physics are spot on. 
But way too short 
Took me 10 minutes to complete.
So a few more levels please and the game would be worth the price.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback! If people like this game, I will definitely keep working on it! Maybe for those who have already bought it, I'll make a DLC with additional levels!
3.99 is a cup of coffee - and for me, it's an incentive to keep working!
Thanks again for the good review!

Well you can update the game!) New levels are ready!)

reviews.review_description:
Having played this a few times now ,getting through a few rooms,it’s awesome I absolutely love it and it’s very addictive 
When I finish I can’t wait to play it again,I would recommend this game it’s well worth the money ,
Fantastic game 5 star

The game is very well produced, good graphics, option of English and Portuguese, option to use the full room to walk freely exceptional, but with handtracking it would be perfect and to show someone what virtual reality is,  the levels are enough, but after finalizing ,I think you should have levels of difficulty, easy, normal and hard in which the difficulty had more levels. Keep up the good work, you are on the right track. Congratulations
Good game, pity that very short. Area movement very interesting concept. This and such games suppose to be future in VR.

Very good escape the Bunker game, sometimes it is a bit glitchy, screen goes black and you can’t see anything. But apart from that very good experience, make sure that you have enough room to play, I’ve hit my ceiling lights a couple of times, so changed my guardian.
I haven’t completed yet
But, Very well done game would recommend trying, you do loose track of time playing as you are immersed in trying to get out.

Developers keep up the good work and look forward to seeing more from you. 👍
